title: Facility pricing_json — canonical examples
description: Concrete examples of the pricing_json blob shape for each of the four pricing models. Consumed by test fixtures + the SDUI pricing editor's presets. Every sample validates against schemas/pricing.schema.json.

invariants: tiers[] is non-empty when model is not included_in_membership
each tier has name + rate_cents (positive integer)
peak_hours mirrors availability_json day shape with a multiplier float per window

examples.name: Per-hour flat rate — $25/hr
examples.notes: The simplest case. One rate, applied per hour, regardless of attendees.

examples.name: Per-hour with member and guest tiers
examples.example_computation: 60-min booking, 1 attendee, member → 15.00 USD; same booking, non-member → 30.00 USD
examples.notes: Tier picker: the booker's active Membership (or lack thereof) chooses the applicable tier.

examples.name: Per-hour with peak-hours multiplier
examples.notes: peak_hours mirrors availability_json shape. A booking window entirely within a peak window gets the full multiplier. A booking straddling peak + off-peak proportions the multiplier by the minutes in each.

examples.name: Per-slot flat rate — 90-min padel court
examples.example_computation: Any booking of any duration → 40.00 EUR
examples.notes: per_slot ignores duration. Ideal when the facility charges by the reservation not the hour.

examples.name: Per-person — group class in a studio
examples.notes: attendees_count drives price. Duration is irrelevant (assumed to be the class length).

examples.name: Facility included in an active Membership — no charge, requires pass

pricing_json.notes: Booking price is 0. A valid Pass covering this facility MUST be available at booking time; the PassCreditGate refuses the booking otherwise.

examples.example_computation: 60-min booking → 0.00 USD; consumes 1 credit from the covering Pass
examples.notes: This is how Wave 4 Finance's Membership → Facility flow attaches. Membership provisions a Pass; Pass grants free-at-point-of-use bookings.

examples.name: Per-hour with an age-based discount tier
examples.notes: The booker's profile.age_band or (for day-pass linked bookings) the day_pass.issued_to_profile_age_band chooses the applicable tier. Falls back to Standard when no age match.
